auth_sign_in_prompt: Sign in to access private campaigns.
login_subtitle: Access private campaigns with your WordPress account.
login_password_error: Password must be at least {{count}} character
login_password_error_other: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
carousel_video_aria: Video {{index}} of {{total}}: {{caption}}. Use arrow keys to navigate, Enter or Space to play.
layout_media_overflow: {{count}} media item(s) have no slot — they won't be displayed.
layout_slot_overflow: {{count}} slot(s) have no media — they'll appear as placeholders.
admin_rescan_done: Rescanned: {{media}} media items updated across {{campaigns}} campaigns.
admin_building_audit_zip: Building audit log ZIP — this may take a moment.
admin_building_media_zip: Building media library ZIP — this may take a moment.
admin_archive_campaign_msg: Archive this campaign? This action will mark it archived.
admin_restore_campaign_msg: Restore this campaign? This will make it active again and enable any associated access grants.
admin_bulk_archive_msg: This will mark all {{count}} selected campaigns as archived. Archived campaigns are hidden from the gallery but can be restored at any time.
admin_bulk_restore_msg: This will restore all {{count}} selected campaigns and make them active again. Any associated access grants will be re-enabled.
admin_delete_campaign_msg: This permanently deletes "{{title}}", its media references, and pending access requests. This cannot be undone.
admin_delete_purge_analytics: Also purge analytics events for this campaign
admin_bulk_delete_msg: This will permanently delete all {{count}} selected campaigns, their media references, and pending access requests. This cannot be undone.
admin_bulk_delete_purge: Also purge all analytics data for these campaigns
admin_dup_copy_media_desc: Media items will appear in both campaigns
admin_dup_empty_media: The duplicate will start with an empty media library.
admin_dup_layout_desc: The copied campaign gets its own editable layout instead of sharing the original template.
admin_dup_layout_keep: The duplicate will keep pointing at the original layout template.
admin_move_info: All analytics, audit history, media references, and access requests move with the campaign. The source space will no longer list it.
admin_import_desc: Select a {{json}} or {{zip}} file exported from WP Super Gallery. Campaigns will be created as drafts — media and layout templates are imported by value.
admin_import_err_invalid: Invalid export file: missing version or campaign key.
admin_import_err_parse: Could not parse JSON. Make sure the file is a valid campaign export.
admin_camp_use_media_thumb: Use existing campaign media as thumbnail
admin_camp_tags_desc: Type a tag and press Enter or comma to add
admin_camp_cats_desc: Assign this campaign to one or more categories
admin_camp_publish_desc: Campaign becomes visible at this date/time
admin_camp_unpublish_desc: Campaign is hidden after this date/time
admin_camp_border_desc: Custom accent border color for this campaign card
admin_camp_gmode_desc: Override the global gallery mode for this campaign
admin_camp_unified_bp_hint: Clear a cell to inherit the global unified adapter for that breakpoint.
admin_camp_pertype_bp_hint: Clear any cell to inherit that breakpoint's global adapter selection.
admin_camp_quick_overrides_hint: Quick per-breakpoint overrides stay inline here. Use the shared responsive editor for mode changes, shared responsive settings, and adapter-specific fields.
admin_camp_clear_overrides_hint: Clear the campaign-specific gallery override state here to fall back to the global gallery configuration.
admin_camp_layout_desc_active: Layout Builder is your selected gallery adapter — choose the template it renders.
admin_camp_layout_desc: Assign a layout template to use the Layout Builder adapter
admin_camp_lb_no_template: Layout Builder is selected as a gallery adapter, but no template is assigned — pick one above, or the gallery falls back to the default adapter.
admin_camp_lb_no_templates: Layout Builder is selected as a gallery adapter, but no layout templates exist yet. Create one in the Layout Builder first.
admin_discard_msg: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
admin_camp_gconfig_custom: This campaign currently stores custom gallery overrides. Use Clear Campaign Overrides to return to inherited global gallery settings.
admin_camp_gconfig_inherit: This campaign is currently inheriting global gallery settings. Any changes saved here will create campaign-specific overrides.
admin_camp_gconfig_unified_desc: Adapter applied when this campaign renders images and videos together.
admin_camp_no_media: No media attached to this campaign.
admin_camp_upload_hint: Uploaded files use their filenames as captions in this modal.
admin_media_exclusive_tooltip: Show only items exclusive to this campaign
admin_media_exclusive_aria: Show only media exclusive to this campaign
admin_media_del_msg: Remove this item from the campaign? The file stays in your media library and can be added to other campaigns.
admin_media_del_usage: It is currently used in {{count}} other campaign — those associations are not affected.
admin_media_del_usage_other: It is currently used in {{count}} other campaigns — those associations are not affected.
admin_media_edit_title_desc: Optional display title for this media item
admin_media_edit_caption_desc: Descriptive text shown with the media
admin_media_batch_hint: When uploading multiple files, each item uses its filename as the default caption.
admin_upload_added_lib: {{count}} file added to the asset library
admin_upload_added_lib_other: {{count}} files added to the asset library
admin_upload_failed_msg: {{failures}} of {{total}} file could not be uploaded.
admin_upload_failed_msg_other: {{failures}} of {{total}} files could not be uploaded.
set_theme_desc: Choose a color theme. Preview applies instantly; saved when you click Save.
set_default_layout_desc: Default layout for displaying gallery items.
set_items_per_page_desc: Number of items to display per page (1-100).
set_app_max_width_desc: Maximum width of the gallery container. Set to 0 for full-width (edge-to-edge). Default 1200px.
set_container_padding_desc: Horizontal padding inside the container. Set to 0 for true edge-to-edge content. Default 16px.
set_fullbleed_desktop_desc: Break out of the WordPress page container padding on desktop viewports. Requires page refresh.
set_fullbleed_tablet_desc: Break out of the WordPress page container padding on tablet viewports. Requires page refresh.
set_fullbleed_mobile_desc: Break out of the WordPress page container padding on mobile viewports. Requires page refresh.
set_gallery_title_text_desc: Main heading text shown above the gallery.
set_show_gallery_subtitle_desc: Show the subtitle text beneath the title.
set_gallery_subtitle_text_desc: Subtitle text shown beneath the title.
set_show_access_mode_desc: Show the Lock / Hide access-mode toggle (admin only).
set_show_filter_tabs_desc: Show the campaign filter tab strip.
set_bg_color_desc: Solid background color for the gallery
set_show_header_border_desc: Show border, shadow, and backdrop blur on the sticky gallery header.
set_authbar_blur_desc: Blur intensity for the auth bar backdrop.
set_authbar_breakpoint_desc: Viewport width below which the auth bar uses mobile layout.
set_idle_timeout_desc: Automatically sign out users after this many minutes of inactivity. Set to 0 to disable.
set_idle_warning_desc: Show a 'Stay signed in' prompt this many seconds before signing out. Set to 0 to sign out without warning.
set_enable_advanced_desc: Unlock the System & Admin tab with granular control over panel behavior, cache, drawer settings, and more.
set_show_tooltips_desc: Display info icons next to Advanced-tab labels that explain each setting on hover.
set_wh_all_events_ph: All events (leave empty to receive all)
set_wh_desc: Webhook endpoints receive signed HMAC-SHA256 POST requests when campaign events occur. Payloads include the event type, ISO timestamp, and event data. Use the {{header}} header to verify delivery authenticity.
set_wh_events_desc: Leave empty to receive all events.
set_wh_secret_body: This is the only time the full secret will be shown. Copy it and configure your endpoint to verify the {{header}} header using HMAC-SHA256.
set_wh_rotated_title: New webhook secret — save this now
set_wh_rotated_body: The secret for {{label}} has been rotated. Update your endpoint receiver with this new value before closing.
set_adv_intro: Fine-grained controls for power users. These settings override internal defaults across all gallery components. Change with care.
set_adv_panel_width_desc: Width of the settings panel drawer on medium and large screens. On small screens it is always 100%.
set_adv_drawer_blur_desc: When enabled, content behind open settings drawers is blurred.
set_adv_panel_anim_desc: Open/close transition for the settings panel drawer. Choose None to disable animation.
set_adv_admin_maxw_desc: Maximum width of the admin panel container. Set to 0 for full width (no constraint).
set_adv_optimize_desc: Automatically resize and compress images on upload.
set_adv_thumb_ttl_desc: How long cached external thumbnails are kept (seconds).
set_adv_debug_markers_desc: When enabled, deployed builds keep explicit React DevTools component names and inject data-wpsg-component/data-wpsg-slot attributes into the DOM for Elements inspection and QA selectors. Local dev may still show source component names even when this is off.
set_adv_purge_after_desc: Archived campaigns older than this are moved to trash. Set to 0 to disable automatic purging.
set_adv_trash_grace_desc: Trashed campaigns are permanently deleted after this many days. Minimum 7 days.
set_adv_analytics_ret_desc: Analytics events older than this are purged weekly. Set to 0 to keep indefinitely.
set_adv_health_unavail_body: Could not load object-cache status from the server.
set_adv_no_cache_body: WordPress is using its default in-memory cache, which is discarded on every request. For higher-traffic deployments consider adding a Redis or Memcached drop-in. See docs/object-cache-setup.md for setup instructions.
set_adv_no_stats: Cache backend detected but no runtime stats are exposed by this drop-in.
set_adv_irreversible_body: When preservation is disabled, deleting this plugin permanently removes all campaigns, layout templates, overlay library, analytics events, access grants, and uploaded thumbnail files. This cannot be undone.
set_adv_preserve_desc: When enabled (recommended), all plugin data is kept if you remove the plugin. Disable only if you intend to wipe all gallery data on uninstall.
set_card_border_mode_desc: How card accent border colors are determined
set_card_border_color_desc: Accent border color applied to all campaign cards
set_card_thumb_h_desc: Height of the card thumbnail area
set_card_thumb_fit_desc: How the thumbnail image fills the card
set_card_show_company_desc: Company badge overlay on card thumbnail
set_card_show_title_desc: Show the campaign title in the card info panel
set_card_show_desc_desc: Show the campaign description in the card info panel
set_card_show_counts_desc: Video and image count below description
set_card_show_border_desc: Accent border and hover border effect
set_card_show_fade_desc: Gradient overlay at bottom of thumbnail
set_card_show_info_desc: Show title, description, tags & media counts below thumbnail
set_card_per_row_desc: Number of columns in the card grid (Auto = responsive)
set_card_max_cols_desc: Cap the number of columns when using Auto layout. 0 = unlimited.
set_card_vgap_desc: Vertical spacing between campaign card rows
set_card_maxw_desc: Limit individual card width. 0 = no limit (fill column).
set_card_scale_desc: Primary sizing multiplier for cards. 1 = default size.
set_card_justify_desc: How cards distribute when a row does not fill the full available width.
set_card_valign_desc: How the card grid aligns vertically when minimum height exceeds content height.
set_card_grid_minh_desc: Minimum height for the card grid container.
set_card_grid_maxh_desc: Maximum height for the card grid area. 0 = no limit.
set_card_grid_offx_desc: Fine-tune horizontal position of the card grid.
set_card_grid_offy_desc: Fine-tune vertical position of the card grid.
set_card_aspect_desc: Lock cards to a fixed aspect ratio
set_card_minh_desc: Minimum height for each card. 0 = no minimum.
set_card_display_mode_desc: How cards are displayed: all at once, progressively loaded, or paginated with arrows
set_card_rows_page_desc: Number of card rows visible per page
set_card_dot_nav_desc: Show dot navigator below the card grid
set_card_lock_icon_desc: Size of the lock icon shown on inaccessible cards
set_card_access_icon_desc: Size of the icon inside the access badge
set_card_badge_offy_desc: Vertical offset from the top edge for access and company badges
set_card_company_maxw_desc: Maximum width of the company badge before truncation
set_card_thumb_hover_desc: Duration of the thumbnail hover zoom effect
set_card_listing_intro: Choose the layout adapter used to render the public campaign listing. Adapter-specific knobs (gap, columns, target row height) are shared with per-campaign galleries in Phase 1.
set_card_listing_desktop_desc: Layout adapter for the campaign listing on desktop.
set_card_listing_override_desc: Optional override for tablet. Leave unset to inherit the desktop selection.
set_card_listing_override_mobile_desc: Optional override for mobile. Leave unset to inherit the desktop selection.
set_card_listing_template_desc: The template whose slots define the positioned containers for campaign cards.
set_viewer_fullscreen_desc: Open campaign viewer in fullscreen mode instead of the default modal.
set_viewer_openmode_desc: What to show when a campaign is opened.
set_viewer_fs_maxwidth_desc: Limit content width in fullscreen mode. 0 = full responsive width.
set_viewer_modal_maxwidth_desc: Maximum width of the campaign modal when not fullscreen (clamped 600-1600).
set_viewer_content_maxwidth_desc: Maximum width of the content area inside the modal. 0 = full width.
set_viewer_inner_padding_desc: Padding inside the modal content area (clamped 0-48).
set_viewer_cover_height_desc: Height of the cover image in the campaign modal
set_viewer_transition_desc: Animation style when opening the campaign modal
set_viewer_transition_dur_desc: Length of the modal open/close animation
set_viewer_maxheight_desc: Maximum height of the campaign modal as a percentage of viewport (clamped 50-95).
set_viewer_show_company_desc: Show the company badge on the campaign cover image.
set_viewer_show_date_desc: Show the creation date under the campaign title.
set_viewer_show_about_desc: Show the "About this Campaign" heading and description.
set_viewer_about_heading_desc: Heading for the campaign description section (default "About").
set_viewer_show_desc_desc: Show the campaign description text within the About section.
set_viewer_show_stats_desc: Show the statistics block (video count, image count, tags, visibility).
set_viewer_stats_admin_desc: When enabled, only admins can see the statistics block.
set_viewer_show_cover_desc: Show the campaign cover image at the top of the viewer.
set_viewer_show_tags_desc: Show tags section in the campaign viewer.
set_viewer_show_admin_actions_desc: Show admin action buttons (edit, archive, etc.) in the campaign viewer.
set_viewer_show_gallery_labels_desc: Show 'Images' and 'Videos' heading labels above galleries in the viewer.
set_viewer_image_label_desc: Custom label for image gallery sections. Count is appended automatically.
set_viewer_video_label_desc: Custom label for video gallery sections. Count is appended automatically.
set_viewer_justification_desc: Horizontal alignment for gallery section labels
set_viewer_label_icon_desc: Display an icon prefix before each gallery section label
set_viewer_modalbg_type_desc: Background style for the fullscreen campaign modal
set_viewer_modalbg_color_desc: Solid background color for the fullscreen modal
set_viewer_close_bg_desc: CSS color for the close button background (e.g. rgba(0,0,0,0.5)).
set_viewer_mobile_bp_desc: Viewport width below which the campaign viewer switches to mobile layout.
set_md_lightbox_desc: Enable fullscreen lightbox when clicking gallery items.
set_md_animations_desc: Enable smooth animations and transitions. Disable for better performance on low-end devices.
set_md_height_constraint_desc: Choose whether classic galleries can overflow, are kept within the visible screen, or use a manual CSS height.
set_md_manual_height_desc: Accepted units: px, em, rem, vh, dvh, vw, %. Example: 75vh or 420px
set_md_image_radius_desc: Corner rounding for image gallery viewport and thumbnails.
set_md_video_radius_desc: Corner rounding for video gallery viewport and thumbnails.
set_md_image_shadow_desc: Box-shadow depth effect for image gallery viewport.
set_md_video_shadow_desc: Box-shadow depth effect for video gallery viewport.
set_md_hover_bounce_desc: Scale-up spring animation when hovering over a tile.
set_md_hover_glow_desc: Drop-shadow glow on hover (works with clip-path shapes).
set_md_transition_fade_desc: Apply an opacity fade when cards enter and exit during transitions, softening abrupt edges.
set_md_transition_type_desc: How gallery media slides between items: fade only, slide only, or combined slide-fade.
set_md_scroll_style_desc: Navigation scroll behavior for gallery thumbnail strips.
set_md_anim_duration_desc: Duration for gallery transition and thumbnail highlight animations.
set_md_anim_easing_desc: Timing function used for gallery transitions.
set_md_thumb_gap_desc: Spacing between thumbnail items in the strip.
set_md_wheel_scroll_desc: Allow mouse wheel to scroll the thumbnail strip horizontally.
set_md_drag_scroll_desc: Allow click-and-drag to scroll the thumbnail strip.
set_md_strip_buttons_desc: Show left/right scroll buttons on the thumbnail strip edges.
set_md_thumb_scroll_speed_desc: Multiplier for thumbnail-strip wheel scroll speed.
set_md_arrow_vpos_desc: Vertical alignment of the overlay prev/next arrows.
set_md_arrow_size_desc: Diameter of the overlay navigation arrows.
set_md_arrow_color_desc: Icon color for the overlay arrows.
set_md_arrow_border_desc: Border thickness around the arrows (0 = none).
set_md_arrow_autohide_desc: Show arrows on hover/interaction. 0 = always visible.
set_md_dot_position_desc: Where to render the dot navigator relative to the viewport.
set_md_dot_active_color_desc: Color for the currently active dot (CSS value).
set_ld_visible_cards_desc: Number of slides visible at once in the carousel.
set_ld_loop_desc: Continuously loop slides when reaching the end.
set_ld_pause_hover_desc: Pause autoplay when the mouse hovers over the carousel.
set_ld_darken_desc: Apply a dark overlay on slides that are not currently selected.
set_ld_darken_opacity_desc: Opacity of the darken overlay (0 = transparent, 1 = fully dark).
set_ld_edge_fade_desc: Fade slides at the edges of the carousel viewport.
set_ld_section_maxw_desc: Maximum width for each gallery section. 0 = fill available space.
set_ld_section_minw_desc: Minimum width floor for gallery sections.
set_ld_height_mode_desc: How section height is determined. Auto = content-driven (recommended for masonry/justified).
set_ld_section_maxh_desc: Maximum height for gallery sections in manual mode.
set_ld_section_minh_desc: Minimum height floor for gallery sections.
set_ld_section_scale_desc: Primary sizing multiplier for gallery sections. Scales min/max width, min/max height, and padding proportionally. 1 = default size.
set_ld_content_halign_desc: Horizontal alignment of adapter content within each gallery section.
set_ld_content_valign_desc: Vertical alignment of adapter content within each gallery section.
set_ld_content_hoffset_desc: Fine-tune horizontal position of section content. Negative = left, positive = right.
set_ld_content_voffset_desc: Fine-tune vertical position of section content. Negative = up, positive = down.
set_ld_equal_height_desc: When using per-type galleries, display image and video sections side-by-side at equal height on tablet+ viewports.
set_ld_section_padding_desc: Inner padding within each gallery section wrapper.
set_ld_adapter_padding_desc: Inner padding within each adapter (gallery grid). 0 = edges meet section boundary.
set_ld_modal_content_valign_desc: Vertical alignment of content within the modal.
set_ld_shell_valign_desc: Vertical alignment of the gallery sections within the viewer shell.
set_ld_shell_voffset_desc: Fine-tune vertical position of the gallery sections. Negative = up, positive = down.
set_ld_gallery_maxw_desc: Maximum width of the gallery container. 0 = full responsive width.
set_ld_adapter_mode_desc: How adapters fill their gallery section. Fill = 100% of section, Manual = custom percentage.
set_ld_adapter_maxw_desc: Adapter width as percentage of its gallery section.
set_ld_adapter_maxh_desc: Adapter height as percentage of its gallery section.
set_ld_adapter_gap_desc: Spacing between items in grid adapters (Compact Grid). 0 = no gap.
set_ld_adapter_justify_desc: How adapter items distribute within the container (Compact Grid, Circular).
set_ld_item_scale_desc: Primary sizing multiplier for gallery items. Scales card width/height (Compact Grid), row height (Justified), and tile size (Shape adapters) proportionally. 1 = default size. Does not apply to Carousel.
set_pr_bg_color_desc: Solid background color behind the viewport
set_pr_bg_gradient_desc: CSS gradient string used behind the viewport
set_pr_image_bg_desc: Background applied behind image gallery viewports
set_pr_video_bg_desc: Background applied behind video gallery viewports
set_pr_unified_bg_desc: Background applied when unified gallery mode is active
set_ad_err_invalid: Stored value "{{value}}" is not a valid option
set_ad_unified_mode_desc: When enabled, images and videos are combined in a single gallery view. When disabled, each media type uses its own layout independently.
set_ad_unified_bp_desc: Choose the unified gallery adapter used at each breakpoint.
set_ad_mobile_unsupported: Some adapters are unavailable on mobile — they require a larger screen (shown greyed out above).
set_ad_pertype_bp_desc: Choose separate image and video adapters for each breakpoint.
set_ad_thresholds_desc: Width thresholds (px) used by the classic carousel adapter to determine the active breakpoint. Defaults match Mantine (768 / 1200).
set_ad_mobile_max_desc: Max container width considered mobile. (320–1440, default: 768)
set_ad_mobile_lt_err: Mobile threshold must be less than tablet threshold
set_ad_tablet_max_desc: Max container width considered tablet. (320–1920, default: 1200)
set_ad_tablet_gt_err: Tablet threshold must be greater than mobile threshold
set_ad_export_note: Exports adapter configuration and carousel/media settings. Global navigation, breakpoint, and presentation settings are not included.
set_ad_reset_all_btn: Reset all adapter settings to defaults
set_gl_adapters_desc: Quick breakpoint selectors stay inline here. Use the responsive editor when you need shared layout settings, adapter-specific fields, or deeper nested config changes.
set_cards_tab_intro: Desktop edits the base card settings. Tablet and mobile can override selected layout and appearance fields without changing the desktop baseline.
set_sys_magic_desc_pre: When an admin clicks a one-click approval link, the result is shown on this page (via
set_sys_magic_desc_post: ). If no page is selected, a minimal inline HTML page is returned instead.
set_typo_intro: Customize fonts, sizes, colors, and effects for individual text elements. Empty fields use theme defaults.
set_sg_media-frame_imageBorderRadius_des: Rounded-corner radius for image media surfaces in supported adapters.
set_sg_media-frame_videoBorderRadius_des: Rounded-corner radius for video media surfaces in supported adapters.
set_sg_photo-grid_thumbnailGap_desc: Space between items in justified and masonry gallery layouts.
set_sg_tile-appearance_tileBorderWidth_d: Tile border thickness. Set 0 to disable borders.
set_sg_tile-appearance_tileBorderColor_d: CSS color used for tile borders when border width is greater than 0.
set_sg_tile-appearance_tileHoverBounce_d: Scale-up spring animation when hovering over a tile.
set_sg_tile-appearance_tileGlowEnabled_d: Drop-shadow glow on hover for supported tile-based adapters.
set_sg_tile-appearance_tileGlowColor_des: CSS color used for the hover glow effect.
set_sg_carousel_imageViewportHeight_desc: Base height used for image-dominant classic galleries before breakpoint scaling. Manual gallery height overrides this when the shared height mode is set to manual.
set_sg_carousel_videoViewportHeight_desc: Base height used for video-dominant classic galleries before breakpoint scaling. Manual gallery height overrides this when the shared height mode is set to manual.
set_sg_carousel_imageShadowPreset_desc: Box-shadow depth effect for image-dominant classic galleries.
set_sg_carousel_imageShadowCustom_desc: CSS box-shadow value used when the image shadow preset is custom.
set_sg_carousel_videoShadowPreset_desc: Box-shadow depth effect for video-dominant classic galleries.
set_sg_carousel_videoShadowCustom_desc: CSS box-shadow value used when the video shadow preset is custom.
set_sg_carousel_carouselVisibleCards_des: Number of slides visible at once in the carousel.
set_sg_carousel_carouselLoop_desc: Continuously loop slides when reaching the end.
set_sg_carousel_carouselDragEnabled_desc: Allow dragging or swiping to navigate slides.
set_sg_carousel_carouselAutoplayPauseOnH: Pause autoplay when the mouse hovers over the carousel.
set_sg_carousel_carouselDarkenUnfocused_: Apply a dark overlay on slides that are not currently selected.
set_sg_carousel_carouselDarkenOpacity_de: Opacity of the darken overlay (0 = transparent, 1 = fully dark).
set_sg_carousel_carouselEdgeFade_desc: Fade slides at the edges of the carousel viewport.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowPosition_desc: Vertical alignment of the overlay prev/next arrows.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowSize_desc: Diameter of the overlay navigation arrows.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowColor_desc: Foreground color used for the overlay arrow icon and border.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowBgColor_desc: Background fill applied behind the overlay arrows.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowBorderWidth_desc: Border thickness around the arrows (0 = none).
set_sg_carousel_navArrowHoverScale_desc: Scale factor applied when hovering the overlay arrows.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowAutoHideMs_desc: Show arrows on hover or interaction. 0 keeps them always visible.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowEdgeInset_desc: Distance between the overlay arrows and the carousel edge.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowMinHitTarget_des: Minimum touch and click target size for the overlay arrows.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowFadeDurationMs_d: Fade-in and fade-out duration used when arrows auto-hide.
set_sg_carousel_navArrowScaleTransitionM: Hover-scale transition duration for the overlay arrows.
set_sg_carousel_dotNavPosition_desc: Where to render the dot navigator relative to the viewport.
set_sg_carousel_dotNavMaxVisibleDots_des: Maximum number of dot buttons shown before truncation inserts ellipses.
set_sg_carousel_dotNavActiveColor_desc: Fill color used for the active dot.
set_sg_carousel_dotNavInactiveColor_desc: Fill color used for inactive dots.
set_sg_carousel_dotNavActiveScale_desc: Scale multiplier applied to the active dot.
set_sg_carousel_viewportHeightMobileRati: Fraction of the viewport height reserved for the carousel on mobile.
set_sg_carousel_viewportHeightTabletRati: Fraction of the viewport height reserved for the carousel on tablet.
set_sg_compact-grid_gridCardWidth_desc: Primary width target for each compact-grid card. The grid wraps responsively around this width.
set_sg_compact-grid_gridCardAspectRatio_: Locks card proportions without requiring a separate height control. Auto keeps legacy height-derived behavior.
set_sg_compact-grid_gridCardMaxColumns_d: Caps the number of compact-grid columns while preserving responsive wrapping.
set_sg_compact-grid_gridCardMinHeight_de: Optional guard that prevents extremely thin cards on narrow containers. Set 0 to disable.
set_sg_justified_mosaicTargetRowHeight_d: Ideal pixel height for each justified row. This is an algorithm input for react-photo-album, not a CSS value.
set_sg_justified_photoNormalizeHeight_de: Normalization pixel height for aspect-ratio scaling before layout. Lower values produce smaller tiles.
set_sg_masonry_masonryColumns_desc: Number of masonry columns. Set 0 to let the layout choose responsively (1-4 based on width).
set_sg_masonry_masonryAutoColumnBreakpoi: Comma-separated width:columns pairs used when masonry columns are set to auto.
set_sg_masonry_masonryEntranceAnimation_: Optional first-render animation for Masonry tiles. 'Waterfall' staggers each tile into view from below. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.
set_sg_masonry_masonryEntranceStagger_de: Delay in milliseconds between successive tile animations in Waterfall mode.
set_sg_spotlight_spotlightHeroAspectRati: Fixed aspect ratio of the hero display area.
set_sg_spotlight_spotlightThumbnailSize_: Width and height of each thumbnail strip item.
set_sg_spotlight_spotlightTransitionDura: Duration of the hero swap and thumbnail highlight transitions.
set_sg_spotlight_spotlightStripPosition_: Position of the thumbnail strip. 'Right' falls back to 'Below' on narrow containers.
set_sg_spotlight_spotlightHeroMaxWidth_d: Maximum width of the spotlight layout. Set 0 to disable (full container width).
set_sg_spotlight_spotlightHeroJustificat: Horizontal alignment of the hero block within the container when Hero Max Width makes it narrower than the container.
set_sg_scroll-snap_scrollSnapAlignment_d: CSS scroll-snap-align value applied to each slide. Controls where each slide snaps relative to the scroll container.
set_sg_scroll-snap_scrollSnapPageIndicat: Show a slide counter (n / total) in the lower-right corner of each slide.
set_sg_scroll-snap_scrollSnapMaxWidth_de: Maximum width of the scroll-snap container. Set 0 to disable (full container width).
set_sg_shape_tileSize_desc: Width and height of each shape tile (unified gallery).
set_sg_shape_imageTileSize_desc: Shape tile size for the image gallery.
set_sg_shape_videoTileSize_desc: Shape tile size for the video gallery.
set_sg_layout-builder_layoutBuilderScope: Full: replaces entire gallery (no thumbnail strip). Viewport: replaces only the viewport area.
set_sg_layout-builder_tileGlowColor_desc: Fallback glow color for slots using Hover = Glow when the slot does not override it.
set_sg_layout-builder_tileGlowSpread_des: Fallback glow radius for slots using Hover = Glow when the slot does not override it.
set_sg_note_layout-builder: Choose which layout this gallery uses with the "Layout Template" picker in the campaign's Settings tab (Edit Campaign). These options only style the chosen layout.
admin_access_empty_campaign: Select a campaign to manage access permissions
admin_access_empty_company: Select a company to manage access permissions
admin_access_none_campaign: No users have access to this campaign yet. Add users below.
admin_access_none_company: No company-wide access grants. Add users below.
admin_access_none_all: No access grants found for this company or its campaigns.
admin_access_user_ph: Search name, email, or enter ID...
admin_access_type_hint: Type name/email or enter user ID
admin_access_note_company_level: Company-level grants give access to all campaigns under the same company.
admin_access_note_company_future: Grants apply to all current and future campaigns for this company.
admin_req_select_campaign: Select a campaign to see access requests.
admin_req_none: No access requests for this campaign.
admin_audit_subtitle: All activity recorded for the selected campaign.
admin_gaudit_csv_aria: Export global audit log as CSV
admin_gaudit_zip_aria: Export global audit log as ZIP
admin_qau_share_note: Share this link securely with the user. They can use it to set their own password.
admin_qau_role_editor: ⚙️ Gallery Editor - Can manage this plugin
admin_qau_test_mode_desc: Enable to test the password reset link UI without actually sending email
admin_space_no_user: No WordPress user found with that email
admin_space_delegated_desc: Only explicit grantees can access this space. Admins without a grant are denied.
admin_space_delegated_alert: In delegated mode, WordPress admins without an explicit grant cannot access this space. Make sure to add yourself as an owner before saving.
admin_space_settings_post: . Unset fields inherit the global defaults.
admin_space_settings_empty: Select a space from the Spaces tab to edit its settings.
admin_space_no_grants: No access grants. Everyone with the manage_wpsg capability can access this space.
admin_space_access_empty: Select a space from the Spaces tab to manage access.
admin_space_library_empty: Select a space from the Spaces tab to manage its shared library.
admin_space_open_desc: Open spaces can use every asset in the library — per-space selection only applies to delegated spaces. Switch this space to delegated isolation mode to restrict its assets.
admin_space_lib_post: is allowed to use. Unselected assets are hidden in this space.
admin_space_no_fonts: No fonts in the global library.
admin_archco_revoke: Also revoke all company-level access grants
admin_archco_warning: Access grants for individual campaigns will be preserved but become inactive.
admin_asset_inuse_msg: "{{name}}" is associated with {{count}} space. Removing it will unlink it from all spaces. Delete anyway?
admin_asset_inuse_msg_other: "{{name}}" is associated with {{count}} spaces. Removing it will unlink it from all spaces. Delete anyway?
admin_sal_empty: No assets in the global library yet. Upload assets from the Layout Builder.
admin_sal_no_match: No assets match the current filter.
admin_analytics_select_hint: Select a campaign to view per-campaign analytics.
admin_analytics_no_events: No view events recorded for this period.
admin_analytics_enable_post: is turned on in Settings → Advanced.
admin_analytics_no_media: No per-media events recorded for this period. Lightbox interactions with media IDs will appear here.
admin_tmpl_desc_ph: e.g. Our standard wedding campaign layout
admin_lt_invalid_json: Invalid template JSON — missing required fields.
admin_lt_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
admin_lt_inuse_msg: "{{name}}" is in use by {{count}} campaign. Deleting it will unbind those campaigns. Delete anyway?
admin_lt_inuse_msg_other: "{{name}}" is in use by {{count}} campaigns. Deleting it will unbind those campaigns. Delete anyway?
admin_ksc_press_hint: Press any key combo, then ✓ to confirm
admin_ksc_footer: macOS: ⌘ replaces Ctrl. Shortcuts are disabled when focus is inside a text input.
admin_theme_desc: Choose a color theme. Preview applies instantly; saved when you click Save.
admin_font_desc: Upload .woff2, .woff, .ttf, or .otf font files. Uploaded fonts appear in the font picker for all typography editors.
lb_slot_listing_note: Listing mode: container effects (tilt, border, overlay, blend) apply to the card wrapper. Image-specific controls are hidden.
lb_slot_listing_image_note: Image fit and focal point settings do not apply in listing mode — slots act as positioned containers for campaign cards.
lb_slot_focus_title: Click a position to set which part of the image stays in frame.
lb_slot_listing_click_note: Card click is controlled by the campaign card component.
lb_gl_click_through_desc: Pointer events pass through to layers below
lb_mask_no_mask: No mask layer on this slot. Add a mask from the Layers panel first.
lb_mask_no_image: No mask image — drag here or pick below
lb_mask_feather_tt: Soften the mask edges. Higher values create a more gradual fade.
lb_props_preview_unavailable: Properties are unavailable in preview mode.
lb_canvas_ann_slot_added: New slot added at cursor position
lb_canvas_ann_media_slot: New slot created with assigned media
lb_canvas_fit_vp_tt: Move/scale the selected slots (or all slots) to fit this device's viewport — applies to this breakpoint only
lb_canvas_fit_cv_tt: Move/scale the selected slots (or all slots) back inside the canvas bounds
